patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 10 rescue (CONFIRM elevating a bottom-bucket 0.50-0.55 pick) has only proven durable when the pre-cap stack hits score>=4-5 with F-signal + SP-xERA + PQI + Stage-agreement all simultaneously affirming (validated 6/12 ARI@CIN, 7/10 CLE@MIA). Today's lone game (NYM@PHI) has pre_cap_score=0, zero F-signals, and PQI running against the pick — the opposite profile — so this is a clean CONFIRM-of-SKIP, not a rescue candidate.

Recent slates (7/9-7/11) show bottom-bucket non-CONFIRM SKIPs split roughly at their historical ~31% hit rate when the pre-cap stack is genuinely thin (no F-signal), versus surprising outperformance only when at least one meaningful F-signal (F3 > 1000) was present. NYM@PHI has no F-signal at all, which argues against optimism even directionally.
